creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 01.02.2014 15:28, Matthieu Volat wrote:
> (this was also submitted to upstream team).

Thanks for looking into this. For cross-reference, here's a link to your
pull request on darktable's side:
https://github.com/darktable-org/darktable/pull/453

I commented on this pull request. If you agree to split it, I can merge
it, as I have write access to darktable's Git repository.

-- 
Jean-Sébastien Pédron
